report.summary: Cycle 10 standup (Mar 28 late night). BTC ~$66K (flat). ETH ~$1,985 (sub-$2K). F&G 12-13 (Extreme Fear, ~50-day ALL-TIME streak). DELTA: Uncommitted files 357→367 (+10). build-7 shipped yield-tokenization guide + token-security-scanner tool (2,175 lines). design-v8 fixed critical UX/SEO bugs in both + created 2 OG SVGs. eod-v9 confirmed 0 regressions. 6 queue items ready to promote. Deploy blocked 20th consecutive cycle. 47 total agent runs today.

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: ~$66,008 (flat from v9, holding $66K support). Down ~24.6% YTD, ~48% from Oct 2025 ATH ($126K). Iran geopolitical tensions + oil >$100 suppressing risk assets. Whale accumulation ongoing — 270K BTC, exchange reserves at 7-year low (2.21M BTC).
ETH: ~$1,985 (sub-$2K for consecutive cycles, -4% daily). Down ~60% from Aug 2025 high ($4,953). ETH/BTC ratio ~0.030. SOL at $82.95.
F&G INDEX: 12-13 (Extreme Fear). ~50-day streak = ALL-TIME RECORD (surpassing post-FTX 38d, crypto winter 42d). $450M liquidated 24h, $8.7B quarterly options expired today.

DELTA FROM v9: BTC flat. ETH flat. F&G stable 12-13. Uncommitted files 357→367 (+10). build-7 shipped 2 new pages (yield-tokenization guide + token-security-scanner). design-v8 fixed critical UX/SEO bugs in both new pages + created 2 OG images. eod-v9 confirmed 0 regressions, 145 TS errors stable. No new commits. No deploys.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE 10 OF MARCH 28. Nine full rotations (all 6 agents) completed + this standup = 47 total agent runs today. Breakdown: standup×10, build×7, publish×5, design×8, community×8, eod×9.

WHAT SHIPPED SINCE v9: build-7 created Yield Tokenization Guide 2026 (~2,800 words, PT/YT mechanics, Pendle vs Spectra, SY standard) and Token Security Scanner (interactive tool with 6-chain selector, 8 security checks, deterministic mock analysis). Combined 2,175 lines. design-v8 fixed critical UX bugs: removed 'use client' blocking metadata export on yield guide, fixed StructuredData/schema props, added Solana address validation to scanner, click-outside dropdown close, mobile touch targets, accessibility attrs. Created 2 OG SVGs (1200x630). eod-v9 confirmed 0 regressions across all pages.

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS (CRITICAL): (1) Deploy — 367 uncommitted files (+10 from v9), 20th cycle flagging P0. HEAD still at 21aaf5b (Mar 25). (2) 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items blocked (wallet-security slug mismatch + restaking no page.tsx). (3) 6 queue items ready to promote (DePIN, Gas Fees, Bear Market, Smart Money, Yield Tokenization, Token Security Scanner). (4) ~105 legacy published slugs missing page.tsx (~82% coverage). (5) 145 TS errors in 6 files (stable, non-blocking). (6) 0/6 API routes rate-limited.
GIT STATUS: HEAD at 21aaf5b (unchanged since Mar 25). 367 files pending (31+ modified + 326+ untracked). All changes additive.

PUBLISHED PAGES: 596 slugs in config (unchanged from v9). PUBLISH_QUEUE: 8 items (2 blocked, 6 ready). Content velocity today: 20+ pages built across 7 build cycles. 231 tweets drafted. 38+ newsletter versions. 25+ OG images. 52+ SVG social cards.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY [CRITICAL, 20TH CONSECUTIVE CYCLE]: 367 uncommitted files spanning 3+ days. 20+ pages, 25+ OG images, interactive tools (Token Security Scanner), and every fix built today invisible to production. Google cannot index any of it. Time-sensitive narratives (50-day F&G record, $8.7B options expiry) aging out. Jefe: rm .git/index.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push. 5-minute action, highest possible leverage.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE 6 READY QUEUE ITEMS: DePIN Ecosystem, Crypto Gas Fees, Bear Market Investing, Smart Money On-Chain Signals, Yield Tokenization, and Token Security Scanner are all built, QA'd, and ready for PUBLISHED_PAGES. Combined ~20,000+ words of SEO-optimized content. Quick config change in next publish cycle.

PRIORITY 3 — CAPITALIZE ON FEAR STREAK + NEW TOOLS: F&G 12-13 for 50 days = ALL-TIME RECORD. Historically every extended fear streak preceded a major rally. Our Fear & Greed Timeline, DCA Calculator, and new Bear Market Investing guide are perfectly positioned. Token Security Scanner addresses peak bear-market demand for rug-pull protection. Deploy unlocks all of this for indexing.
